overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player moves along wet sidewalks beneath massive overpasses, past palm trees and holographic billboards, with light traffic and scattered pedestrians populating the cyberpunk urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the massive concrete overpass

entered.detail: massive elevated concrete highway structure spanning overhead with industrial lighting
tall gray concrete wall running parallel to the sidewalk
fluorescent lights mounted underneath the overpass structure
distant glowing advertisements visible down the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, enclosed walkway beneath a massive elevated highway. The concrete retaining wall runs along the left side while the overpass creates a tunnel-like atmosphere with artificial lighting. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead on the wet concrete sidewalk as vehicles pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with palm trees alongside elevated highway

events.description: exits the covered section under the overpass into a more open area with visible sky and palm trees

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk passing palm trees and approaching large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees with textured trunks lining the sidewalk edge
large vertical digital billboard displaying red and white beverage advertisement
commercial building with prominent green neon 'softsys' signage

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens to reveal palm trees lining the sidewalk and a large digital billboard ahead. The highway overpass now runs along the left side while the green 'softsys' neon sign becomes visible on a building to the right. The atmosphere shifts from enclosed to open with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with industrial district across the canal

events.description: camera pans left to reveal the water canal and industrial smokestacks on the opposite bank

agents.ego_description: walking while looking toward the waterfront industrial area across the canal

entered.detail: dark waterway running parallel to the street with reflections of city lights
tall industrial chimneys with red warning lights across the water
safety railing along the edge of the waterfront promenade

segments.scene_description: The camera reveals a waterfront view with industrial smokestacks visible across the dark canal. The metal railing lines the edge of the walkway while the massive digital billboard now dominates the right side of the frame. The highway overpass continues in the distance as the scene takes on an industrial waterfront atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with crosswalk and neon-lit commercial buildings

events.description: begins crossing the multi-lane street at the yellow striped crosswalk
turns left while crossing to follow the flow of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while navigating through other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection
group of pedestrians crossing the street together

entered.detail: yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
large pink and purple illuminated billboard with animated graphics
street light poles with traffic signals at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player crossing a busy intersection at the yellow crosswalk, surrounded by other pedestrians. Vehicles drive through the intersection while neon signs including the pink billboard and green 'softsys' sign illuminate the scene. The camera turns left while crossing, revealing more of the downtown towers and street infrastructure before reaching the opposite sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic urban underpass into a wide, neon-drenched downtown waterfront. It begins within a narrow, tunnel-like walkway beneath a massive elevated highway, moving past sparse pedestrians along a wet concrete sidewalk. As the camera emerges from the cover of the overpass, the environment opens up to reveal palm trees and the glow of a green softsys neon sign. The scene then shifts toward a dark canal, where the view expands to show industrial smokestacks across the water and a massive digital billboard dominating the skyline. Finally, the camera moves through a busy intersection at a yellow crosswalk, turning left to reveal towering downtown infrastructure illuminated by pink and green neon lights.
